falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if β1 (cap_gains_rate) is negative and significant at p<0.10 for both investment and new business density (i.e. lower rate → more investment/entry). PARTIAL if negative and significant for investment but not business density. REFUTED if β1 is positive and significant at p<0.10. INFORMATIVE: excluding USA should not eliminate the negative sign; if it does, the result is driven by US-specific episodes.
